page.home.title: typo — AI text refinement for your desktop
hero.title: Refine selected text with AI — instantly
hero.description: typo is an AI-powered desktop tool that refines your selected text with smart suggestions and corrections. Select text, press a shortcut, and let the result paste back where you were working.
hero.video_fallback: Your browser does not support embedded video. See the intro in the project README on GitHub.
hero.video_caption: Quick intro — same clip as in the README
features.title: Built for fast text workflows
features.description: typo stays out of your way until you need it — then it captures selection, runs your prompt, and pastes the result.
features.items.multi_model.title: Multi-model support
features.items.multi_model.body: Works with DeepSeek and local Ollama models so you can choose cloud or on-device AI.
features.items.hotkeys.title: Global hotkeys
features.items.hotkeys.body: Quick activation with Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + X (or your system shortcut on Wayland).
features.items.pasting.title: Intelligent pasting
features.items.pasting.body: Clipboard-based replacement for maximum compatibility across apps and input methods.
features.items.customizable.title: Customizable
features.items.customizable.body: Tailor AI behavior via system prompts and up to five prompt shortcuts in Settings.
testimonials.title: What people say about typo
testimonials.description: Feedback from early testers and alpha users. {download} and try it, or read the {docs}.
testimonials.quote.yuler: I currently use Typo to improve my English grammar, and I wanted to share it with you.
testimonials.role.creator: Creator of typo
testimonials.quote.jianwu: I'm learning Japanese now, and I think this tool can help people like us who want to learn a foreign language.
testimonials.quote.gonghui: Amazing tool, I love this tiny thing.
page.docs.title: Documentation — typo
page.docs.description: Guides and reference for the typo desktop app.
page.docs.heading: Documentation
page.docs.p: Install typo, learn the workflow, prompt shortcuts, and platform-specific notes. Use the sidebar to move between pages.
page.blog.title: Blog — typo
page.blog.description: Updates and notes from the typo project.
page.blog.heading: Latest updates
page.blog.hero_p: News and write-ups from the typo project — releases, workflow tips, and behind-the-scenes notes.
docs.default_description: Guides and reference for the typo desktop app.
base.default_description: typo — an AI-powered desktop tool that refines your selected text with smart suggestions and corrections.
